case_title: YEE, DAI SHEK vs. GUEVARA, JOSE R DBA AVENUE VIDEO/APPLIANCES et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, DAI SHEK AS TO DEFENDANT GUEVARA, JOSE R DBA AVENUE VIDEO/APPLIANCES DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT GUEVARA, JOSE R DBA AVENUE VIDEO/APPLIANCES
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF OCT-20-1993, OVERRULED 5 DAYS TO ANSWER.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUEVARA, JOSE R DBA AVENUE VIDEO/APPLIANCES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2442 BAYSHORE BLVD. (DOWNSTAIRS), SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA. $5,028.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,028.00, STAYED UNTIL NOV-30-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH SIDE SHALL BEAR OWNS FEES & COSTS. PLTF ACKNOWLEDGES HOLDING DEPOSITS FROM DEFT IN AMOUNT OF $1350.00 WHICH WILL BE ACCOUNTED FOR WITHIN 2 WEEKS AFTER DEFT HAS VACATED.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
